scope: Scope C — scale closure, targeting the two top bottlenecks identified in Scale Readiness Note Patch 7 (F1 factor validation write path and F3 bundle panel fetch + evaluator reload).

c1a_records_batch_upsert_helpers.behavior: Each helper issues a single upsert per table per factor-validation run (N+1 → 1).

c1b_runner_accumulate_then_flush.before: per-row insert inside the per-factor loop (3 write calls per factor × N factors)
c1b_runner_accumulate_then_flush.after: accumulate into three in-memory buffers, then call the batch upsert helpers once per table per run

c2a_bundle_panel_cache.scope: per-invocation (deduplicates redundant fetch_joined calls for the same panel across horizons)

c2b_evaluator_single_reload.default_behavior: Bundle is loaded once up front and reloaded only after a spec produced a bundle mutation.

e1_harness_tick_queue_filter.behavior: When provided, only the named queue class is drained this tick. Unknown queue classes produce an ok:false CLI contract error.
e1_harness_tick_queue_filter.use_case: Railway worker can drain only sandbox_queue on a tight cadence without retouching all queues.
